# Scriptora Validation Suite — Report Comparativo

Generato: 2026-05-31T04:27:18.348Z

## Corpus
- 10 capitoli Romance
- 10 capitoli Thriller
- 10 capitoli Fantasy
- 10 capitoli Self Help
- **40 capitoli totali**

## Confronto pipeline
| Pipeline | Descrizione |
|---|---|
| **Baseline (pre A+B+C+D)** | Humanize only — nessun pre-delivery gate |
| **Corrente (A+B+C+D+E)** | Humanize + Orchestrator + Greatness Pass + Pre-Delivery Gate |
